name: jbb-feature-dev
description: Complete feature development workflow: /interview for requirements gathering, /research-problem for codebase research, /map-feature-to-plans and /break-down-initiative for feature splitting, /create-plan-tdd and /implement-plan-tdd for test-driven planning and execution, /code-review for multi-agent review, /verify-implementation for evidence generation, /commit and /pr-description for git workflows.
